product_name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Dark Magician Girl (Vibrant Edition) - Standard Edition

bullets: Officially licensed Yu-Gi-Oh! collectible statue — Dark Magician Girl, Vibrant Edition
Dark Magician Girl depicted high in the air with wand raised, ready for battle
Intricate details on the Magician's Seal behind her and colorful magic orbs on the base
Trained by Dark Magician herself, she helped Yugi defeat foes from Battle City to the Duel Festival
Comes in a collector's box with F4F leaflet and 500 reward points
content.description: Dark Magician Girl is a six-star level spellcaster and her spells are not to be taken lightly. She has trained with the best—Dark Magician. Dark Magician Girl helped Yugi defeat many foes from Battle City to the Duel Festival. For this statue, Dark Magician Girl is high up in the air and with her wand in front, ready to go into battle! Behind her is the Magician’s Seal, and colorful magic orbs sprout from the base.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• Dark Magician Girl PVC statue
• Unique pose inspired by the artwork of the trading cards
• Intricate details on the Magician’s Seal, magic orbs, and base
• Collector’s Box & F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
